Package com.example.lottery

package com.example.lottery
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description

    com.example.lottery.util
     
  • Class
    Description
    AdminBrowseEventsActivity
    AdminBrowseEventsActivity serves as the administrator event browser, displaying a summary of all events.
    AdminBrowseImagesActivity
    AdminBrowseImagesActivity serves as the administrator image browser, displaying all event posters.
    AdminBrowseLogsActivity
    Admin page for browsing all notification logs sent by organizers to entrants.
    AdminBrowseProfilesActivity
    Allows administrators to browse all user profiles in the system.
    AdminEventDetailsActivity
    AdminEventDetailsActivity displays a read-only administrator view of a specific event.
    AdminImageAdapter
    Adapter for displaying event poster images in the admin image browser.
    AdminImageAdapter.OnImageClickListener
    Interface definition for a callback to be invoked when an image item is clicked.
    AdminImageDetailsActivity
    AdminImageDetailsActivity displays a full-size poster preview for administrators.
    AdminSignInActivity
    Admin authentication screen.
    CancelledListAdapter
    Adapter for cancelled entrants RecyclerView to display a list of entrants that cancelled the specific event
    CommentAdapter
     
    EntrantAdapter
    Adapter for displaying a list of entrants (Users) in a ListView.
    EntrantCommentBottomSheet
     
    EntrantDetailsFragment
    fragment for showing details of an entrant in an event
    EntrantEventAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter used to display events to entrants on the EntrantMainActivity screen.
    EntrantEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
    Listener interface used to notify when an event item is clicked.
    EntrantEventDetailsActivity
    Activity that displays detailed information about a specific event from an entrant's perspective.
    EntrantEventHistoryActivity
    Activity that displays the history of events an entrant has registered for.
    EntrantHistoryAdapter
    Adapter for displaying the entrant's event registration history.
    EntrantHistoryAdapter.HistoryItem
     
    EntrantHistoryAdapter.OnItemClickListener
     
    EntrantLotteryGuidelinesActivity
     
    EntrantMainActivity
    Main activity for the entrant user role.
    EntrantMapActivity
    Activity to display entrants' locations on a map for a specific event and status.
    EntrantProfileActivity
    EntrantProfileActivity displays and manages the personal profile of an entrant user.
    EntrantQrScanActivity
    Activity for entrants to scan promotional QR codes.
    EntrantsListActivity
    Activity to display entrants of different status of a event by list and able to sample they
    EventAdapter
    Adapter for displaying a list of events in the Organizer Dashboard.
    EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
     
    GeneralSignInActivity
    GeneralSignInActivity is now deprecated in favor of device-based login in MainActivity.
    InvitedListAdapter
    Adapter for invited entrants RecyclerView to display a list of entrants that have been invited to the specific event
    LotteryApplication
    Base class for maintaining global application state.
    MainActivity
    MainActivity serves as the entry point where users choose their role.
    NotificationAdapter
    Adapter used to display notifications in a RecyclerView.
    NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder
     
    NotificationAdapter.OnNotificationClickListener
     
    NotificationFragment
    DialogFragment used by Organizers to input a notification message.
    NotificationFragment.NotificationListener
    Interface for components that handle the actual notification sending logic.
    NotificationLogAdapter
    Displays organizer notification logs in the admin log browser.
    NotificationsActivity
    Activity that displays a list of notifications for the currently logged-in entrant.
    NotSelectedListAdapter
    Adapter for entrants who were not selected during the lottery draw.
    NotSelectedListAdapter.ViewHolder
     
    OrganizerBrowseEventsActivity
    OrganizerBrowseEventsActivity serves as the organizer event browser, displaying a summary of published events.
    OrganizerCreateEventActivity
    Activity for organizers to create or edit events.
    OrganizerEventDetailsActivity
    Activity to display the details of a specific event and handle registration.
    OrganizerInviteCoOrganizerDialogFragment
     
    OrganizerInviteEntrantDialogFragment
     
    OrganizerLotteryGuidelinesActivity
     
    OrganizerNotificationEventAdapter
    Adapter for displaying events in the Organizer Notifications screen.
    OrganizerNotificationEventAdapter.OnNotificationGroupClickListener
    Listener interface for handling clicks on notification group buttons.
    OrganizerNotificationEventAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder class for caching UI component references in each list item.
    OrganizerNotificationsActivity
    Activity that allows organizers to manage and send notifications to different groups of entrants.
    OrganizerProfileActivity
    Activity class representing the profile screen for an organizer.
    OrganizerQrCodeDetailActivity
    Activity for displaying the large QR code for a specific event.
    OrganizerQrEventAdapter
    Adapter for displaying events in the QR code selection list.
    OrganizerQrEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
    Interface definition for a callback to be invoked when an event item is clicked.
    OrganizerQrEventListActivity
    Activity that displays a list of events for the organizer to select and view their QR codes.
    OrganizerUploadPosterDialogFragment
    DialogFragment for handling event poster selection and preview.
    ProfileAdapter
    Adapter class for displaying user profiles in a list.
    SampleFragment
    fragment for user to enter the number of invitations they want to send
    SignedUpListAdapter
    Adapter for signed up entrants RecyclerView to display a list of entrants that signed up the specific event
    WaitedListedListAdapter
    Adapter for waited listed entrants RecyclerView to display a list of entrants that joined the specific event but not invited
    WaitingListActivity
    WaitingListActivity Displays the entrants who are currently in the waitlisted status for the selected event.
